commit_scope: Forward-port the local kernel router intent onto latest main: native Form routes remain kernel-served, unmatched GET paths can fan out to a Python upstream with route-decision headers.

local_validation.notes: test_serve.py proves native /hello and /echo return X-Form-Router: native-kernel, no-upstream /missing remains local 404, and --upstream forwards unmatched /python-tail and upstream 404 responses with X-Form-Router: fanout-python.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Rust Form kernel can act as the HTTP front door for native Form routes while forwarding unmatched GET paths to a Python upstream, with X-Form-Router identifying native-kernel, fanout-python, or local-control decisions.

phase_gate.reason: This embodies the local kernel-router partial work. Full BML thesis parity remains open: .bml corpus compile, full BMF rule execution, class/inheritance parity, and forward/backward native execution still need dedicated slices.

evidence_refs: form/form-kernel-rust/test_serve.py runs the kernel forward as an HTTP front door and proves native/fan-out route decisions by headers and bodies.
scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py reports no unexpected BML/BMF native additions.
